name: Mermaid Flowchart — Drug Interaction Decision Tree
input: Create a flowchart showing a drug interaction decision tree: Start → Check Drug A → Is there interaction? → Yes → Check severity → Severe → Contraindicated → Stop; Moderate → Adjust dose → Monitor; No interaction → Prescribe normally → End
qualityCriteria: No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Multi-branch decision tree with conditional paths, diamond decision nodes, and terminus nodes.

data.syntax:
flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B[Check Drug A]
    B --> C{Drug Interaction?}
    C -->|Yes| D{Check Severity}
    C -->|No| H[Prescribe Normally]
    D -->|Severe| E[Contraindicated]
    D -->|Moderate| F[Adjust Dose]
    E --> G[Stop]
    F --> I[Monitor Patient]
    H --> J[End]
    I --> J
data.caption: Drug interaction decision tree for clinical pharmacology
